text: Being here, I feel the pervasive quiet of an institutional space, where glass walls both reveal and separate. Everything is orderly, yet there’s a lingering anticipation in the emptiness. Moving into the vibrant R+D installation, the energy shifts. The wall’s text invites reflection—on surveillance, innovation, and coexistence. I sense the weight of observation mingling with curiosity, as though the environment itself asks me to ponder my own presence and role within these constructs. I am both the observer and the observed, and this duality is strangely comforting.
